reference:
Subject: Follow-Up on Senior Backend Engineer Application — Imran Bin Hasan

Dear Hiring Team,

I hope this message finds you well.

I am writing to follow up on my application for the Senior Backend Engineer position, which I submitted on June 2nd. I wanted to express my continued interest in the role and check whether there are any updates regarding the selection process.

With four years of hands-on experience in NestJS and backend systems, I believe I can contribute meaningfully to your engineering team from day one. I am available for an interview at any time this week and would be happy to work around your schedule.

Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you.

Sincerely,
Imran Bin Hasan

Subject: Update on Project Delivery Timeline

Dear [Client Name],

I hope you are doing well.

I am writing to inform you of an unfortunate update regarding your project. Due to unexpected issues with a third-party API integration that is a core component of the solution, we are unable to meet the original delivery date of June 20th. The revised delivery date is July 20th.

I sincerely apologize for this inconvenience. I understand that timelines matter, and I take full responsibility for communicating this as transparently as possible. As a gesture of goodwill, we would like to offer a 10% discount on the final invoice.

We are working diligently to ensure the remaining work meets the quality you expect, and we remain committed to delivering a solution you are satisfied with.

Thank you for your understanding and continued trust.

Sincerely,
Imran Bin Hasan

Subject: Automate Your HR Onboarding — Free Trial Inside

Hi [Name],

Hope you're having a good week.

I wanted to reach out because we've built something that companies like yours tend to find genuinely useful. Our AI-powered HR automation tool helps teams reduce onboarding time by up to 40% — less manual work, fewer dropped tasks, and a smoother experience for new hires.

It's designed specifically for companies in the 50–200 employee range, where HR teams are small but the workload isn't. We're offering a free 14-day trial with no commitment, so you can see the impact before making any decisions.

Would you be open to a quick 15-minute call to see if it's a fit?

Best,
Imran Bin Hasan

Subject: Request for a Brief Meeting — API Partnership Discussion

Dear [CTO's Name],

I hope this message finds you well.

My name is Imran Bin Hasan, and I am reaching out to request a 30-minute meeting at your convenience. I would like to explore the possibility of an API partnership between our platforms, which I believe could be mutually beneficial.

Our platform currently serves over 10,000 active users, and based on what I have observed about your product, I see a strong complementary fit. An integration between our two systems could meaningfully enhance the experience for users on both sides.

I am fully flexible on timing and happy to work around your schedule. Please let me know a time that works best for you.

Thank you for considering this request. I look forward to the possibility of connecting.

Sincerely,
Imran Bin Hasan

Subject: Payment Reminder — Invoice #1042 (Overdue)

Dear [Client Name],

I hope you are well.

I am writing to follow up on Invoice #1042 for $3,500, which was due on June 1st and remains outstanding as of today, June 17th — now 16 days past the due date.

I understand that things can sometimes slip through, and I wanted to bring this to your attention promptly. Payment can be made via bank transfer or through the Stripe link attached to the original invoice.

If there is any issue with the invoice or if you require any clarification, please do not hesitate to reach out. I would appreciate your earliest attention to this matter.

Thank you.

Sincerely,
Imran Bin Hasan

Subject: Feedback on the Recent Project — Well Done and a Few Notes

Hi [Name],

I hope you are doing well.

I wanted to take a moment to share some feedback following the completion of our recent project. First and foremost, I want to acknowledge that you delivered on time, which is something I genuinely appreciate and do not take for granted.

Your communication throughout the project was one of the highlights — your standups were clear, consistent, and helpful for the whole team. That kind of reliability makes a real difference.

At the same time, I want to be honest about one area for growth: the code quality, particularly around test coverage, needs some attention. This is not a criticism of your ability — it is a gap that is very common at this stage of a career. I would like to recommend you attend a code review workshop, which I think will accelerate your progress significantly.

Overall, I am proud of the work you did. Let us keep building on it together.

Warm regards,
Imran Bin Hasan

Subject: Content Partnership Proposal — Co-Authored Blog Series

Dear [Name],

I hope this message finds you well.

I am reaching out with a partnership idea that I believe could create real value for both of our audiences. Since we both serve a developer-focused community, I think there is a natural opportunity to collaborate on a co-authored blog series that would benefit readers on both sides.

My proposal is straightforward: we co-create a series of in-depth technical articles, publish them across both platforms, and implement a simple revenue-share model on any leads generated through the content. It keeps things fair, transparent, and low-risk for both parties.

I would love to jump on a discovery call next week to explore whether this feels like a good fit. Please let me know your availability.

Looking forward to the possibility of working together.

Sincerely,
Imran Bin Hasan

Subject: URGENT — Critical Payment Bug in Production (12% of Users Affected)

Hi [Name],

Flagging a critical issue that needs your immediate awareness.

At 2am, we identified a bug causing payment failures for approximately 12% of users. The engineering team is actively working on a hotfix and the estimated resolution time is 4 hours. Affected customers have already been notified.

No action is required from you right now, but I wanted to make sure you are looped in given the severity. I will send an update as soon as the fix is deployed and verified.

Will keep you posted.

Imran

Subject: Inquiry Regarding Merit-Based Scholarships for International MSc Applicants

Dear Admissions Team,

I hope this message finds you well.

My name is Imran Bin Hasan, and I am writing to inquire about merit-based scholarship opportunities available for international students applying to the MSc in Computer Science program for the 2027 intake.

I am currently completing my undergraduate degree in Computer Science and Engineering in Bangladesh, with a CGPA of 3.69. My primary academic interest lies in the Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning track, and I am deeply motivated to pursue graduate-level study in this field.

As an international applicant, understanding the available funding options is an important part of my planning process. I would be grateful if you could share any information about eligibility criteria, application deadlines, or any documentation required for scholarship consideration.

Thank you sincerely for your time. I look forward to your guidance.

Sincerely,
Imran Bin Hasan

Subject: Contract Renewal Discussion — Requesting Revised Terms

Dear [Account Manager's Name],

I hope you are doing well.

As our current contract approaches its renewal date, I wanted to open a conversation about the terms going forward. We have been a customer for three years now, and over the past year our usage has grown by approximately 60% — which I think speaks to how embedded your platform has become in our workflow.

Given that growth and our long-standing relationship, I would like to request either a discount on the current annual rate of $12,000, or alternatively, additional seats at the same price. Either option would allow us to continue scaling our usage without significantly increasing costs, which is important for our planning right now.

I am happy to get on a call to discuss what is possible. Please let me know a time that works for you.

Thank you for your continued support.

Sincerely,
Imran Bin Hasan
